# PERF-070 positive: go func(){} in a Gin handler with no WaitGroup/done channel/context cancel
lang: go
file: PERF-070-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func backgroundWork() {
	// runs after the response has been written
}

func LeakyHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	go func() {
		backgroundWork()
	}()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
